race.comment: PAT'S LAST BANG (4) hits this third-up and on the back of a solid performance in a CL5 at Northam last time out. The inside draw is a big tick for her today as she can land on the speed from a good draw. Should be at her peak fitness now and she can get back to winning form. CRIMMO (7) flew home to win at Geraldton last time out, scoring by 1.1L when flying from the back of the pack. He rates highly on the back of that performance. He's likely to get back in the run once again, but can get over the top to score back-to-back wins. LET'S SEA (1) finished 0.9 lengths from the winner in sixth on turf at Dongara two starts back. Missed the frame in another run on turf last time at Geraldton over 1619m when 6 lengths adrift in fourth. Better placed and can make amends. LIM'S SARBACH (9) ran a better race last start, finishing 3.5 lengths away in fourth over 1413m at Geraldton. Finds a nice race and can bounce back. DREAM ILLUSION (8) is next best.
